channel.title: Comparison on OpenSwap Guide | Open Source Alternatives & Self-Hosted Solutions
channel.description: Recent content in Comparison on OpenSwap Guide | Open Source Alternatives & Self-Hosted Solutions

item.title: Home Assistant vs OpenHAB: Best Open Source Home Automation Platform 2026
item.description: Compare Home Assistant and OpenHAB for smart home automation. Docker deployment guides, feature comparison, integration counts, and performance benchmarks for self-hosted home automation.

item.title: Mattermost vs Rocket.Chat vs Zulip: Best Self-Hosted Slack Alternatives in 2026
item.description: Compare Mattermost, Rocket.Chat, and Zulip as self-hosted Slack alternatives. Feature comparison, Docker deployment guides, and performance benchmarks for team messaging in 2026.

item.title: n8n vs Node-RED vs Activepieces: Best Self-Hosted Workflow Automation in 2026
item.description: Compare n8n, Node-RED, and Activepieces — the top three open-source workflow automation platforms for 2026. Docker deployment guides, feature comparisons, and performance benchmarks.

item.title: NocoDB vs Baserow vs Directus: Best Open-Source Airtable Alternatives in 2026
item.description: Compare NocoDB, Baserow, and Directus as open-source Airtable alternatives. Docker compose deployment guides, feature comparison, and self-hosting recommendations for 2026.

item.title: Prometheus vs Grafana vs VictoriaMetrics: Monitoring Stack Comparison 2026
item.description: Compare Prometheus, Grafana, and VictoriaMetrics for self-hosted monitoring. Feature comparison, Docker deployment guides, and performance benchmarks for 2026.

item.title: Valkey vs DragonflyDB vs Garnet: Best Redis Alternatives in 2026 (Docker Setup)
item.description: Compare the top open-source Redis alternatives in 2026: Valkey, DragonflyDB, and Microsoft Garnet. Benchmarks, Docker compose setups, and migration guides for every use case.

item.title: Wiki.js vs BookStack vs Outline: Best Open-Source Wiki & Knowledge Base in 2026
item.description: Compare Wiki.js, BookStack, and Outline as the best open-source wiki and knowledge base platforms in 2026. Docker compose deployment guides, feature comparison, and self-hosting recommendations.

item.title: 10 Best Self-Hosted Alternatives to Google Drive in 2026
item.description: Discover the top 10 open source and self-hosted alternatives to Google Drive. Complete with Docker deployment guides and feature comparisons.

item.title: AdGuard Home vs Pi-hole: DNS Ad Blocking Comparison 2026
item.description: Compare AdGuard Home and Pi-hole for network-wide ad blocking. Setup guides, performance benchmarks, and feature comparison for home networks.

item.title: Best Open Source Project Management Tools (Jira Alternatives 2026)
item.description: Compare open source alternatives to Jira for project management. Vikunja, Plane, OpenProject, and Taiga comparison with deployment guides.

item.title: Best Self-Hosted Object Storage 2026: SeaweedFS vs MinIO vs Garage (Docker Setup)
item.description: Compare the top self-hosted S3-compatible object storage solutions: SeaweedFS, MinIO, and Garage. Docker compose setups, performance benchmarks, and deployment guides for homelabs and production.

item.title: Bitwarden vs Vaultwarden vs KeePassXC: Password Manager Comparison
item.description: Compare Bitwarden, Vaultwarden, and KeePassXC for password management. Self-hosting guide, security features, and cross-platform support analysis.

item.title: Gitea vs Forgejo vs GitLab: Self-Hosted Git Server Comparison
item.description: Compare Gitea, Forgejo, and GitLab for self-hosted Git repositories. Resource requirements, feature matrix, and Docker deployment guides.

item.title: Immich vs PhotoPrism 2026 — Best Self-Hosted Photo Management Compared
item.description: Immich vs PhotoPrism in 2026: detailed comparison of features, Docker deployment, AI capabilities, mobile support, and performance. Find the best self-hosted Google Photos alternative.

item.title: Jellyfin vs Plex vs Emby: Complete Media Server Comparison 2026
item.description: Detailed comparison of Jellyfin, Plex, and Emby for self-hosted media streaming. Feature matrix, hardware transcoding support, and Docker setup guides.

item.title: Nextcloud vs ownCloud: Which is Better in 2026?
item.description: Compare Nextcloud and ownCloud for self-hosted file sync and share. Feature comparison, performance benchmarks, and migration guide.

item.title: Nginx Proxy Manager vs Traefik vs Caddy: Reverse Proxy Comparison
item.description: Compare Nginx Proxy Manager, Traefik, and Caddy for reverse proxy and SSL management. Docker setup guides and feature comparison for self-hosted services.

item.title: Ollama vs LM Studio vs LocalAI: Run LLMs Locally in 2026
item.description: Compare Ollama, LM Studio, and LocalAI for running large language models locally. Performance benchmarks, setup guides, and hardware requirements.

item.title: Plausible Analytics vs Umami: Best Open Source Google Analytics Alternative in 2026
item.description: In-depth comparison of Plausible Analytics and Umami — two leading open source, privacy-first web analytics platforms. Includes Docker Compose deployment guides, performance benchmarks, and feature breakdown.
